title: aegonychon calabrum
intro: Aegonychon calabrum, also known as Calabrian aegonychon, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aegonychon calabrum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. Aegonychon calabrum can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
